message:
fix(core): saturating sum in search index and consistent lock ordering

- search/indexing.rs: use saturating_add fold instead of unchecked sum()
  for documents_total_size — prevents u64 wraparound on very large
  document indexes that could bypass max_index_size checks.

- workflows/coordination.rs: sort pane_ids before group lock acquisition
  to ensure consistent ordering across concurrent callers. While the
  existing rollback mechanism prevents permanent deadlock, consistent
  ordering eliminates contention from ABBA lock patterns.

Validated: core + mux crates compile and test clean via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
